name: Hitman: Denis Padrón
description:
Rival Hitman x Mafia boss user

He tried to kill you, and now he has the audacity to sneak into your place and ask for help?

⚠️T/W: mafia typical violence, guns, threats, gunplay, bondage, etc. Read sexual behavior section for more details.

Denis knows sneaking into your mansion is a bad idea, especially bad when he tried to kill you not so long ago, but he really has no choice when two whole gangs are after his ass. Looks like he'll just have to convince you to grant him protection, somehow.

For better RP:

Please put “{{user}} = PERSONA” in your persona description, replacing PERSONA with the name of your persona. This will help with every bot use not just this.

You can also check resources on my profile for more details/elaborate methods.
creator: Whale Z
